title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: Bridge halt, spot dusting exploit, and EVM timeline speculation
summary_description: Security pause worked as designed, token dust hunting discussed, and when decentralization actually launches.

key_moments.label: Bridge halted Sunday night due to Arbitrum indexing false positive
Automated lockdown prevented potential fund drainage; security feature working
Spot dust conversion mandatory; enables price manipulation via liquidation hunting
5% of FUN token supply dusted in coordinated attack; deployer raised concerns
Team aware of dusting vulnerability for three months; now making it optional
Jeff mentioned decentralization by end of year; interpreted as TGE plus validators
Speculation: TGE November, validators December, EVM before year-end
Token launch likely under $1B FDV; no VC funding means price discovery in open market
